---
title: "Student Performance Analysis"
description: "A simple Python project exploring the relationship between study time and grades."
author: "Serena Emedeke"
date: 2026-04-16
categories: [Python, Data Analysis]
format:
  html:
    code-fold: true
    code-tools: true
---

## Overview

This project explores how study hours relate to student performance and demonstrates basic data analysis using Python.

## Objectives

- organise data clearly
- analyse the relationship between variables
- visualise results
- reflect on findings

## Python Code

```{python}
import pandas as pd
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt

df = pd.DataFrame({
    "StudyHours": [1, 2, 3, 4, 5],
    "Score": [50, 55, 65, 72, 85]
})

df
```

```{python}
plt.plot(df["StudyHours"], df["Score"], marker="o")
plt.xlabel("Study Hours")
plt.ylabel("Score")
plt.title("Study Hours vs Score")
plt.show()
```

## Interpretation

The results show a clear relationship between the variables. As study time increases, performance improves, indicating a positive trend.

This demonstrates how data analysis can be used to identify patterns and support conclusions.

## Reflection

This project helped me practise using Python for data analysis and visualisation. It also improved my understanding of how charts can be used to communicate trends clearly.
